title: When a Feller Needs a Friend

actors: Jackie Cooper, Charles 'Chic' Sale, Ralph Graves
plot: Eddie wears a leg brace and his mother will not let him play like the other boys. His hope is that a German doctor will be able to operate and fix his leg. When his cousin Froggie comes to live with his family, he is nice to Mr. a...
